title: nephelium daedaleum
intro: Nephelium daedaleum, also known as the rattan tree or rattan palm, is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae that is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nephelium daedaleum include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as having antioxidant and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
